paper_title: Defining a mid-Holocene earthquake through speleoseismological and independent data: implications for the outer Central Apennines (Italy) seismotectonic framework

methods.description: A structural-geological analysis was conducted along the main conduit and lateral branches of the Cavallone 30 Cave to identify earthquake-related structures and assess speleothem damage.

steps.description: Measurements of fallen directions, dimensions of speleothems and distribution of speleothem fracturing were collected in the 5 sectors of the cave considered suitable for the study.
steps.searchable_summary: collect measurements of speleothem features in cave sectors

steps.description: Only broken stalagmites lying on sub-horizontal or slightly inclined cave ground have been considered for the statistical analysis of the representative azimuths of fallen directions.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis on azimuths of fallen stalagmites

steps.description: Careful observations have been also made to eliminate other causes for speleothem damage.

methods.description: AMS Radiocarbon dating was performed on damaged speleothems to provide a detailed paleoseismic interpretation.

steps.description: AMS Radiocarbon dating of damaged speleothems has been performed by Beta Analytic Radiocarbon Dating Laboratory, Florida, USA.
steps.searchable_summary: perform AMS Radiocarbon dating on speleothems

methods.description: Analysis of speleothem features and orientations to infer past seismic events and their impact on the cave structure.

steps.description: The analysis of the orientation of the fallen stalagmites cemented on the floor reveals two preferential trends: NNW-SSE and ENE-WSW.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze orientation trends of fallen stalagmites

steps.description: The preferential orientation of broken speleothems has been widely considered as seismic-related and often found as concordant with the orientation of the seismogenic causative faults.
steps.searchable_summary: model seismic relationship with speleothem orientation
